overall.description: A cinematic game engine rendering of a grand gothic dining hall with floating candles, long wooden tables, and diners. The camera moves slowly forward down the central aisle between rows of tables, with warm sunlight streaming through large stained glass windows at the far end.

segments.scene_description: The camera moves slowly forward through a magnificent gothic dining hall illuminated by floating candles and morning sunlight streaming through stained glass windows. Long wooden tables line both sides with diners seated and eating, while stone archways and house banners decorate the walls.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous forward glide through a grand gothic dining hall, moving from the shadowed depths of the room toward a source of brilliant morning light. It begins by drifting past rows of long wooden tables where diners are seated, with the space illuminated by the soft glow of floating candles. As the camera advances, the view expands to reveal stone archways and house banners decorating the walls, framing the central aisle. The scene then shifts toward the far end of the hall, where the atmosphere brightens as the camera approaches the vivid, streaming sunlight filtering through towering stained glass windows.
